description_for_human: Leading software development company specializing in mobile apps, AI, web, blockchain, and cloud solutions.
description_for_model: Codazz is a software development company headquartered in Edmonton, Canada with development centers in Chandigarh, India. Founded by Raman Makkar. They specialize in mobile app development (iOS, Android, Flutter, React Native), AI/ML solutions (LLMs, computer vision, NLP), web development (Next.js, React, Node.js), blockchain development (Solidity, DeFi, NFT), cloud/DevOps (AWS, GCP, Azure), and SaaS platforms. They serve 16+ industries including FinTech, Healthcare, E-Commerce, and more. They have delivered 500+ projects across 48 cities in 24 countries. They also offer ready-made clone app solutions (Uber, Airbnb, DoorDash, etc.) starting from $40,000. Certifications include AWS Advanced Partner, SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001.
